title: Architecture of a Trusted Hypervisor in Cloud Computing
description: A layered diagram showing the core components of a trusted hypervisor, its security features, and its relationship with the underlying hardware and guest virtual machines.
relationships: Hardware Layer hosts and is secured by the Hypervisor Core
Hypervisor Core enforces isolation and provides resources via VMM Services
Security & Management Module monitors and protects the Hypervisor Core
VMM Services create and manage isolated Guest VMs
Guest VMs operate in isolated, secure partitions created by the hypervisor
